characters.description: AbeRelativesFawz (Father)Biographical informationMarital statusUnknownDate of birthUnknownPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHeightUnknownWeightUnknownEye colorUnknownAbeisFawz'sson and a DJ. characters.name: Marcus
characters.description: MarcusMarcus (Left)AliasesMarc (By Franco)RelativesFranco (Cousin)AffiliationSuperior Donuts (Formerly)Biographical informationMarital statusUnknownDate of birthUnknownPlace of birthUnknownPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHeightUnknownWeightUnknownEye colorUnknownMarcusisFranco'scousin. He appears for the first time inBalls and Streaks. Marcus first appears in Balls and Streaks whereArthurinitially doesn't trust him due to him having been arrested before, but after Marcus gives him tickets he got from a friend (later revealed to beTush) to the Cubs game. Arthur hires him as delivery boy for Superior Donuts. However, since Tush got these from a person in an old RadioShack, they turn out to be worthless. Arthur fires Marcus, but eventually rehires him after Tush tells him that he was the one who gave Marcus the tickets. InPedal to the Meddle, Marcus quits his job. Marcus is played byClayton Thomas.
